domain: Restaurant Point of Sale & SaaS Admin System

pos_terminal.vibe: High-contrast Light Mode, tactile, haptic, Apple-like whitespace, ultra-legible.

admin_dashboard.vibe: Slate & Indigo color palette, Professional SaaS (Stripe/Linear), dense but clean data.

rules: No Inter for headings. Use Satoshi for that modern Stripe/Linear feel.
Prices and Order Numbers MUST use JetBrains Mono (already in index.css).
Use tracking-tight for all headings above 24px.
Avoid pure black. Use Slate-900 (#0F172A) for high-contrast dark elements.
POS terminal must remain bright, high-contrast Light Mode to prevent staff fatigue.
Admin uses a dark Slate/Indigo aesthetic to separate context from the POS.
Pay button and main CTAs use the semantic colors (Success Green for Pay).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous Apple-like whitespace. Use p-6, p-8 for containers, gap-4 to gap-6 for grids.

pos_terminal.structure: Categories Top/Left -> Product Grid Center -> Cart Sidebar Right -> Pay Button Bottom Right.
pos_terminal.pay_button_placement: Always fixed at the absolute bottom-right corner of the viewport/cart area. Make it massive.

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar left (260px). Main content right. Dense bento-style grids for metrics (grid-cols-4).

rules: No default Shadcn generic cards for the POS item grid. Build custom haptic rectangular items.
Grid children must be direct children. Override default stretch with align-items: start where necessary.

buttons_haptic.style: Modern rounded-lg or rounded-xl, sharp borders, no muddy shadows.
buttons_haptic.interaction: Haptic-ready: MUST use 'active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-75' on all POS action buttons.
buttons_haptic.dynamic_state: Payment buttons (Cash/Card) must visually highlight ONLY when the cart has > 0 items.

glassmorphism.usage: Overlays, Modals, Command+K Search, Top sticky navs.

micro_interactions.place_order: Button must have an 'animate-pulse' ring or visual highlight when an order is ready to be placed.
micro_interactions.feedback: Use Sonner for toast notifications on success/error.

icons.style: Use robust, stroke-width 2 icons. Avoid thin, illegible icons on POS.

login_background.description: Blurred modern restaurant interior. Use as a full-bleed background for the Login Page with a dark/slate overlay.

company_logo.description: Minimalist geometric abstract shape for the HevaPOS brand logo.

rules: Images must be responsive and constrained. POS item images should have aspect-square with object-cover.
Never use generic placeholder services. Only use the URLs provided above.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) to ALL interactive buttons, links, and forms.
Do NOT rely entirely on Shadcn default styling for the POS grid; build custom, haptic-feeling elements that scale down for active states.
Implement the Z-Pattern on the POS UI: Categories top-left, Items middle, Cart Sidebar right, with a MASSIVE Pay button at the very bottom-right of the cart sidebar.
Implement a Global Command+K Search Modal using the defined Glassmorphism classes.
Ensure prices inside the cart and item grid use JetBrains Mono (already linked in index.css) for tabular clarity.
Replace existing POS styles in App.css and index.css with cleaner, utility-class driven Tailwind implementations following these guidelines.
